concept: Consider a shooter where the player's weapon can only fire in patterns based on celestial constellations they've discovered. Exploring the game world reveals new star patterns that unlock increasingly powerful or specialized firing formations. Enemy designs specifically challenge players to use appropriate constellation patterns, with certain foes vulnerable only to specific stellar arrangements. The environment contains planetarium-like chambers where stars can be rearranged to create custom constellations with unique properties. Your character is a cosmic archaeologist seeking to prevent ancient constellation-based weapons from falling into the hands of those who would use them to reignite a celestial war.
